---
title: "4_PrepModelData"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
rm(list=ls())
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(MuMIn)
library(car)
library(parallel)
library(patchwork)
library(corrplot)

options(na.action = "na.fail")

readRDS("data/demog/vr_modData/mod_data.rds") %>% list2env(.GlobalEnv)
clim <- read_csv("data/climate/for_analyses/clim_summary.csv")
clim_vars <- names(clim)[!names(clim) %in% c("site", "pop", "year")]

microtopo <- read_csv("data/output/model_microtopo_25cm.csv")
mt_vars <- names(microtopo)[!names(microtopo) %in% c("site", "pop", "plantID","elv_pt")]
mt_mod_vars = setdiff(mt_vars,"prcv_25")

corrplot(cor(microtopo[mt_vars]))

surv_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(surv_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")
growth_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(growth_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")
repro_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(repro_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")
nflrs_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(nflrs_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")
```

# --------------
# Fit and dredge global models

```{r vr_global_models}
surv_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("surv ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
surv_mt_mod <- glmer(formula = surv_mt_formula, family = "binomial", data = surv_mod_data_scaled)
summary(surv_mt_mod)

growth_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("growth ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
growth_mt_mod <- lmer(formula = growth_mt_formula, data = growth_mod_data_scaled, REML = F)
summary(growth_mt_mod)

repro_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("flowered ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
repro_mt_mod <- glmer(repro_mt_formula, data = repro_mod_data_scaled, family = binomial)
summary(repro_mt_mod)

nflrs_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("total_flrs ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
nflrs_mt_mod <- glmer(nflrs_mt_formula, data = nflrs_mod_data_scaled, family = poisson)
summary(nflrs_mt_mod)
```

```{r mt_dredge}
# Note: must not name the cluster 'cl' — MuMIn uses cl <- match.call() internally,
# which causes a name collision that silently breaks parallel dispatch.
clust <- makeCluster(12, type = "FORK")

dredge_surv_mt <- dredge(surv_mt_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2, # m.lim = c(0,15),
  subset = (est_25 + nrt_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25 + plcv_25) <= 3)

dredge_growth_mt <- dredge(growth_mt_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2, # m.lim = c(0,15),
  subset = (est_25 + nrt_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25 + plcv_25 ) <= 3)

dredge_repro_mt <- dredge(repro_mt_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2, # m.lim = c(0,15),
 subset = (est_25 + nrt_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25 + plcv_25) <= 3)

dredge_nflrs_mt <- dredge(nflrs_mt_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2, # m.lim = c(0,15),
  subset = (est_25 + nrt_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25 + plcv_25) <= 3)

stopCluster(clust)
```

```{r mt_model_selection}
surv_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_surv_mt, subset = 1)[[1]]
surv_mt_vars <- intersect(rownames(summary(surv_mt_best_mod)$coefficients), mt_mod_vars)

growth_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_mt, subset = 1)[[1]]
growth_mt_vars <- intersect(rownames(summary(growth_mt_best_mod)$coefficients), mt_mod_vars)

repro_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_repro_mt, subset = 1)[[1]]
repro_mt_vars <- intersect(rownames(summary(repro_mt_best_mod)$coefficients), mt_mod_vars)

nflrs_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_nflrs_mt, subset = 1)[[1]]
nflrs_mt_vars <- intersect(rownames(summary(nflrs_mt_best_mod)$coefficients), mt_mod_vars)
```

```{r growth_var_mt_dredge}
growth_var_mod_data_scaled <- growth_mod_data_scaled %>%
  mutate(growth_resid.sq = residuals(growth_mt_best_mod)^2)
growth_var_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("growth_resid.sq ~ log_size_t0*(year + site +", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
growth_var_mt_mod <- lmer(growth_var_mt_formula, data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled, REML = FALSE, na.action = na.fail)

clust <- makeCluster(10, type = "FORK")
dredge_growth_var_mt <- dredge(growth_var_mt_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0", "year"), trace = 2,
                                subset = (est_25 + nrt_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25 + plcv_25) <= 3)
stopCluster(clust)

growth_var_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_var_mt, subset = 1)[[1]]
growth_var_mt_vars <- intersect(rownames(summary(growth_var_best_mod)$coefficients), mt_mod_vars)
```

# save best mt models
```{r save_mt_only_models}

# mt_mods <- list(surv_mt_best_mod = surv_mt_best_mod,
#                   growth_mt_best_mod = growth_mt_best_mod,
#                   repro_mt_best_mod = repro_mt_best_mod,
#                   nflrs_mt_best_mod = nflrs_mt_best_mod,
#                   growth_var_mt_best_mod = growth_mt_best_mod,
#                   growth_var_mt_mod_data_scaled = growth_var_mod_data_scaled)
# 
# saveRDS(mt_mods,"r/modelFitResults/best_mt_mods_Apr8.RDS")
```


```{r read_mt_models}
mt_mods <- readRDS("r/modelFitResults/best_mt_mods_Apr8.RDS") %>% list2env(envir = .GlobalEnv)

formula(surv_mt_best_mod)
formula(growth_mt_best_mod)
formula(repro_mt_best_mod)
formula(nflrs_mt_best_mod)
formula(growth_var_mt_best_mod)

clim_mods <- readRDS("r/modelFitResults/best_clim_mods_Apr8.RDS") %>% list2env(envir = .GlobalEnv)
```

# --------------
# clim variable winnowing: univariate R², correlation + VIF
# --------------

```{r mt_univariate_r2, fig.width = 9, fig.height = 6}
vr_mod_list <- list(
  surv = list(data = surv_mod_data_scaled, response = "surv", family = "binomial"),
  growth = list(data = growth_mod_data_scaled, response = "growth", family = "gaussian"),
  # growth_var = list(data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled, response = "growth_resid.sq", family = "gaussian"),
  flowered = list(data = repro_mod_data_scaled, response = "flowered", family = "binomial"),
  n_flrs = list(data = nflrs_mod_data_scaled, response = "total_flrs", family = "poisson")
)

clim_r2 <- data.frame()

for (v in clim_vars) {
  for (vr_name in names(vr_list)) {
    
    vr  <- vr_mod_list[[vr_name]]
    
    dat <- vr$data[, c(vr$response, v)] %>% drop_na()
    
    fml <- as.formula(paste(vr$response, "~", v))
    r2  <- tryCatch({
      if (vr$family == "gaussian") {
        
        summary(lm(fml, data = dat))$r.squared
      
        } else {
        m <- glm(fml, data = dat, family = vr$family)
        1 - m$deviance / m$null.deviance
      }
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_)
    clim_r2 <- rbind(clim_r2, data.frame(vr = vr_name, var = v, r2 = r2))
  }
}

r2plot <- clim_r2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(r2)) %>%
  # filter(vr=="repro") %>% 
  mutate(var = reorder(var, r2, FUN = mean)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = r2, y = var)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, color = "#5BADA8") +
  facet_wrap(~vr, scales = "free_x",ncol=1) +
  labs(x = "R² / pseudo-R²", y = NULL,
       title = "Microtopo variables — univariate variance explained per vital rate") +
  theme_bw();r2plot

corr_plot <- clim %>%
  select(all_of(c("site", clim_vars))) %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
    .x %>%
      cor(use = "pairwise.complete.obs") %>%
      as.data.frame() %>%
      rownames_to_column("var1") %>%
      pivot_longer(-var1, names_to = "var2", values_to = "r")
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(var1 = factor(var1, levels = clim_vars),
         var2 = factor(var2, levels = rev(clim_vars))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = var1, y = var2, fill = r)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(r, 2)), size = 2) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#2166AC", mid = "white", high = "#B2182B",
                       midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  facet_wrap(~site, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "r")
(r2plot | corr_plot)

surv_clim_vars <- c("gs_meanT_range","gs_snow_days")
growth_clim_vars <- c("win_meanT_range","gs_meanT_mean","gs_snow_days")
nflrs_clim_vars <- c("ann_snow_days","gs_meanT_mean","win_meanT_range")
repro_clim_vars <- c("gs_meanT_mean","gs_meanT_range","win_meanT_range")
```


# try to winnow variables one at a time using AICc
```{r test_mt_vars}

# survival
survival_base <- surv_mt_best_mod
base_AICc <- AICc(survival_base)

for(clim_var in clim_vars){
  mod_new <- update(survival_base, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", clim_var)))
  AICc(mod_new)                   
  cat(paste(c(clim_var,"new:",round(AICc(mod_new),2),"base:",round(base_AICc,2),"\n")))
}
# ann_snow_days new: 3004.21 base: 3005.65 
# win_meanT_mean new: 3001.98 base: 3005.65 
# win_meanT_range new: 3006.87 base: 3005.65 
# gs_snow_days new: 3004.85 base: 3005.65 
# gs_meanT_mean new: 2997.5 base: 3005.65 
# gs_meanT_range new: 2987.27 base: 3005.65 

# growth
growth_base <- growth_mt_best_mod
base_AICc <- AICc(growth_base)

for(clim_var in clim_vars){
  mod_new <- update(growth_base, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", clim_var)))
  AICc(mod_new)                   
  cat(paste(c(clim_var,"new:",round(AICc(mod_new),2),"base:",round(base_AICc,2),"\n")))
}

# ann_snow_days new: -141.85 base: -141.01 
# win_meanT_mean new: -140.59 base: -141.01 ##
# win_meanT_range new: -139.44 base: -141.01 ##
# gs_snow_days new: -150.75 base: -141.01 
# gs_meanT_mean new: -149.93 base: -141.01 
# gs_meanT_range new: -140.43 base: -141.01 ##

# nflr
nflr_base <- nflrs_mt_best_mod
base_AICc <- AICc(nflr_base)

for(clim_var in clim_vars){
  mod_new <- update(nflr_base, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", clim_var)))
  AICc(mod_new)                   
  cat(paste(c(clim_var,"new:",round(AICc(mod_new),2),"base:",round(base_AICc,2),"\n")))
  cat(round(base_AICc,2) - round(AICc(mod_new),2),"\n")
}
# ann_snow_days   new: 40433.65 base: 40450.97 
# win_meanT_mean  new: 40445.67 base: 40450.97 
# win_meanT_range new: 40421.95 base: 40450.97  ### 3
# gs_snow_days    new: 40358.21 base: 40450.97  # 1
# gs_meanT_mean   new: 40406.11 base: 40450.97  ## 2
# gs_meanT_range  new: 40440.41 base: 40450.97  

# repro
repro_base <- repro_mt_best_mod
base_AICc <- AICc(repro_base)

for(clim_var in clim_vars){
  mod_new <- update(repro_base, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", clim_var)))
  AICc(mod_new)                   
  cat(paste(c(clim_var,"new:",round(AICc(mod_new),2),"base:",round(base_AICc,2),"\n")))
  cat(round(base_AICc,2) - round(AICc(mod_new),2),"\n")
}

# ann_snow_days new: 5755.13 base: 5756.13 
# 1 
# win_meanT_mean new: 5758.11 base: 5756.13 
# -1.98 
# win_meanT_range new: 5739.51 base: 5756.13 ### 3
# 16.62 
# gs_snow_days new: 5737.55 base: 5756.13 # 1
# 18.58 
# gs_meanT_mean new: 5737.7 base: 5756.13 ## 2
# 18.43 
# gs_meanT_range new: 5757.51 base: 5756.13 
# -1.38 

```


```{r mt_global_models}

surv_mt2clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "surv ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat + ",
  paste(c(surv_clim_vars, surv_mt_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(surv_clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(surv_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))

surv_clim_mt_mod <- glmer(surv_clim_mt_formula, family = binomial, data = surv_mod_data_scaled)
formula(surv_clim_mt_mod)
length(attr(terms(surv_clim_mt_mod), "term.labels"))

growth_clim_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "growth ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat + ",
  paste(c(growth_clim_vars, growth_mt_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(growth_clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(growth_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
growth_clim_mt_mod <- lmer(growth_clim_mt_formula, data = growth_mod_data_scaled, REML = FALSE)
formula(growth_clim_mt_mod)
length(attr(terms(growth_clim_mt_mod), "term.labels"))

repro_clim_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "flowered ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat + ",
  paste(c(repro_clim_vars, repro_mt_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(repro_clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(repro_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
repro_clim_mt_mod <- glmer(repro_clim_mt_formula, family = binomial, data = repro_mod_data_scaled)
formula(repro_clim_mt_formula)
length(attr(terms(repro_clim_mt_mod), "term.labels"))

nflrs_clim_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "total_flrs ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat + ",
  paste(c(nflrs_clim_vars, nflrs_mt_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(nflrs_clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(nflrs_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
nflrs_clim_mt_mod <- glmer(nflrs_clim_mt_formula, family = poisson, data = nflrs_mod_data_scaled)
formula(nflrs_clim_mt_formula)
length(attr(terms(nflrs_clim_mt_mod), "term.labels"))
```

```{r clim_mt_dredge}
# Note: do not name the cluster 'cl' — MuMIn uses cl <- match.call() internally,
# which causes a name collision that silently breaks parallel dispatch.
clust <- makeCluster(40, type = "FORK")

dredge_surv_clim_mt <- dredge(surv_clim_mt_mod, cluster = clust, m.lim = c(0,15),
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", "year", surv_clim_main), trace = 2)

dredge_growth_clim_mt <- dredge(growth_clim_mt_mod, cluster = clust, m.lim = c(0,15),
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", growth_clim_main), trace = 2)

dredge_repro_clim_mt <- dredge(repro_clim_mt_mod, cluster = clust, m.lim = c(0,15),
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", repro_clim_main), trace = 2)

dredge_nflrs_clim_mt <- dredge(nflrs_clim_mt_mod, cluster = clust, m.lim = c(0,15),
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", nflrs_clim_main), trace = 2)

stopCluster(clust)
```

```{r mt_model_selection}
surv_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_surv_mt, subset = )[[1]]
growth_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_mt, subset = )[[1]]
repro_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_repro_mt, subset = )[[1]]
nflrs_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_nflrs_mt, subset = )[[1]]
```

```{r growth_var_mt_dredge}
growth_var_mod_data_scaled <- growth_mod_data_scaled %>%
  mutate(growth_resid.sq.mt = residuals(growth_mt_best_mod)^2)

growth_var_clim_main <- intersect(all.vars(formula(growth_var_best_mod)), clim_vars)

growth_var_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "growth_resid.sq ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site +",
  paste(c(growth_var_clim_main, mod_mt_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(growth_var_clim_main, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(mod_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
growth_var_mt_mod <- lmer(growth_var_mt_formula, data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled, REML = FALSE)

clust <- makeCluster(40, type = "FORK")

dredge_growth_var_mt <- dredge(growth_var_mt_mod, cluster = clust,
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", growth_var_clim_main), trace = 2,
  subset = (slp_25 + est_25 + nrt_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25 + plcv_25) <= 4 &
           !(slp_25 & tri_25))

stopCluster(clust)

growth_var_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_var_mt, subset = )[[1]]
```
